rationale: Your SoC is 0.25 below threshold while my own is declining; conservative policy requires I maintain 0.6 minimum before sharing, and accepting would undermine my buffer against collective deficit conditions.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
